message:
deps: bump anyhow 1.0.97 -> 1.0.102

Patch-level bump; no API changes. `cargo update -p anyhow` reported
"Locking 0 packages" because the lockfile had already resolved to 1.0.102
through a transitive dep; the workspace manifest pin now matches reality.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean
(only pre-existing vendored-fuser warnings).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -46,7 +46,7 @@ doc_markdown = { level = "allow", priority = 1 }
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
 # External dependencies
-anyhow = "1.0.97"
+anyhow = "1.0.102"
 arc-swap = "1.7.1"
 bitflags = "2.9.0"
 blake3 = "1.6.0"
